title: SQL: 'insert..select..group by' fails null constraint
poc: CREATE TABLE a (S varchar(255) PRIMARY KEY);
CREATE TABLE b (S varchar(255) PRIMARY KEY);
INSERT INTO b SELECT S FROM a GROUP BY S;
SELECT S FROM a GROUP BY S;
INSERT INTO b SELECT * FROM (SELECT S FROM a GROUP BY S) AS t;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE c (ID INT PRIMARY KEY, Name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE d (ID INT PRIMARY KEY, Name VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO d SELECT ID, Name FROM c GROUP BY ID, Name;
INSERT INTO d SELECT ID, NULL FROM c GROUP BY ID;
